Don't do open source

2026-03-04 | culture compiler

Dont do open source. Seriously, no one asked you to open source your project. Open source maintainers have been burning out recently and that made me realise on thing. We have defaulted to projects being open source due to [change]websites like Github being social. There is no reason why everyone should reach for a MIT liscence for every project. Use SSPl if you dont want coorporations to profit off your work. Who cares its not “real” open source.

How did we get here?

You should probably think about licenses.

No one owes you anything if you opensource your code, it will probably be stolen by some data scraping company.
